name: golden-reportingdashboard
description: Golden-case end-to-end: given ReportingDashboard project description, asserts resulting PR chain produces buildable Blazor Server project with header/timeline/heatmap components. Full lifecycle from enhancement creation through merge.

config.projectDescription: A Blazor Server reporting dashboard with interactive charts showing team velocity, sprint burndown, and code quality heatmaps. Uses Chart.js for visualizations and includes a responsive header with project selector.

main.README.md:
# ReportingDashboard
A Blazor Server reporting dashboard

agent/se-1/reporting-dashboard.Components/Pages/Dashboard.razor: @page "/"
agent/se-1/reporting-dashboard.Components/Header.razor:
@ProjectName

@code { [Parameter] public string ProjectName { get; set; } = ""; }
agent/se-1/reporting-dashboard.Components/VelocityChart.razor: 📊 Team Velocity
agent/se-1/reporting-dashboard.Components/BurndownChart.razor: 📉 Sprint Burndown
agent/se-1/reporting-dashboard.Components/QualityHeatmap.razor: 🔥 Code Quality Heatmap

issues.title: Enhancement: Build reporting dashboard with velocity, burndown, and heatmap charts
issues.body: Create a Blazor Server dashboard with Chart.js visualizations

issues.title: SoftwareEngineer: Full Dashboard Implementation
issues.body: Task T1: Implement all dashboard components including header, velocity chart, burndown chart, and quality heatmap

agentScripts.response: APPROVED: The implementation follows Blazor Server conventions correctly. Component decomposition is clean with proper parameter passing. Chart.js integration via canvas elements is the standard approach.

The screenshot shows a well-structured dashboard with a dark header containing the project name and selector, and three chart cards below in a responsive grid: Team Velocity (purple), Sprint Burndown (red), and Code Quality Heatmap (blue). All sections have visible titles and styled borders.

All tests pass.
- Unit tests: 5 passed
- Integration tests: 2 passed
- Build: succeeded
APPROVED: All acceptance criteria met. The dashboard displays velocity, burndown, and heatmap visualizations with responsive layout and project selector.
